overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a trench coat navigating a dark, foggy industrial environment at night. The character moves from an outdoor courtyard through a metal gate, enters a brick building, ascends stairs, and explores industrial maintenance corridors with metal walkways and pipes.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a foggy outdoor courtyard at night, passing a burning barrel and wooden cart. The scene is dimly lit with atmospheric fog as the character approaches and opens a metal gate, passing through into a narrow alley with a wooden building on the left.

segments.scene_description: The character enters a brick building and ascends a wooden staircase with metal railings. The interior features exposed brick walls illuminated by wall sconces. The character navigates narrow corridors on the upper floor with mesh fencing along the edges.

segments.scene_description: The character explores an industrial maintenance area with metal grating walkways and extensive pipe systems overhead. The environment features green ventilation ducts, scattered debris, and metal barrels. The character passes a section with large openings revealing the foggy exterior before continuing through the dimly lit industrial corridors.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a foggy outdoor courtyard into the claustrophobic, industrial interior of a brick building. It begins in the dim night air, passing a burning barrel and wooden cart before the character opens a metal gate to enter a narrow alley. As the camera moves inside, the environment shifts to a brick interior where the character ascends a wooden staircase illuminated by wall sconces and navigates upper-floor corridors lined with mesh fencing. The scene then expands into a maintenance area characterized by metal grating walkways and a complex network of overhead pipes and green ventilation ducts. Finally, the camera passes large openings that reveal the lingering exterior fog before pushing deeper into the dimly lit industrial corridors.
